titleStmt.title: SII 9.267: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 267. (A.R. No. 107 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE SURYANARAYANA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1082, Vikrama, Bhādrapada, puṇṇame, Bṛihaspativāra, Sōma-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1160 August 18 Thursday, when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva as ruling over Kaḍambaḷige thousand, Ballakunda three-hundred and Kōgaḷi five-hundred. In the presence of the fifty (Mahājanas) of Bāguḷi, Dharmavve, wife of the Brāhman general Chiddaṇa, who was the son of the brave general Māḷapayya, and the daughter of Padmanābha, who was the son of the Brāhman Dharmeya-Shaḍaṅgi of Kāśyapagōtra, is said to have made a grant of land for the worship of the god Lakshmīnārāyaṇadēva set up by herself in Bāguḷi, for the pay of the śāstra teacher and of a Purāṇa reader and for the subsistence of the priests employed in the temple. Dharmavve is praised for her learning and character. Here it may be noted that the record refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalla II, though it is known that his successor began to rule in A.D. 1150.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīnārīpriyanurbbarāmarasuvaṁśarggayvadiṁbargge dēvānīkōṁnatacārumauḷimaṇirukpuṟpārccitāṁghridvayaṁ . nānānantaguṇāspa
daṁ vividhavidyādhīśvaraṁ viṣṇu lakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvanīge sukhamaṁ caṁdrārkkaruḷḷaṁnega . kaṁ . śrīramaṇīśaṁ lakṣmīnā
rāyaṇadēvanakhiḷabhuvanavinūtaṁ dhīraṁ śrīdharavibhugaṁ strīratnaṁ dharmmavadhugamīgabhimatamaṁ . vanajākṣanābhipaṁkajajanitacaturmmu
khavinirmmitōrvvīmadhyaṁ jananutajaṁbūdvīpāvani yidaṟoḷu teṁkaleseva bharatakṣētra . bharatadharitrīstrībhāsurakuntaḷamenipa kuntaḷō
rvviyanāḷdaṁ naranāthamauḷilāḷitacaraṇaṁ jagadēkamallarāyanajēya . v® . pariyiṭṭībappanī bappane kaḍumunisiṁ vīrape
rmmāḍirāyaṁ nirutaṁ tānendu cōḷaṁ madamanuḍugidaṁ gauḷanaḷḷāḍidaṁ barbbararājaṁ garbbamaṁ tānuḷidanagidanaṁdhraṁ teraḷdō
ḍipōdaṁ marubhūpaṁ māḷavaṁ marggidanatibhayadiṁ gūrjjaraṁ gūḍugoṁḍa . svīkṛtacōḷadhanaṁ rakṣīkṛtavaṁgāṁgamagadhadhātrītaḷamaṁgīkṛ
takaḷiṁgagajanadharīkṛtagūrjjaranudāttaśauryyaṁ permma . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatupratāpacakravarti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhiv®ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . v® . giridurgakkaśanisvarūpanacaḷatkā
ntāradurggakke bhīkaradāvānaḷanatyudāttajaḷadurggakkaurvvaneṁdaṁdu saṁgaradoḷu mārmmaledoḍḍi niṁdu bayaloḷu
māṟāntu bāḷvaṁnarārnnaranāthāgraṇi vīrapāṁḍyanoḷiḷālōkaikavikhyātanoḷ . turagārōhaṇaviddegōjanenipaṁ rē
vantadēvaṁge sadturuvenduṁ bhṛguviṁge śastrakaḷeyoḷu śāstrāgamajñānadoḷu piriyaṁ padmabhavaṁge duṣṭagajaśikṣā
cāryyaniṁdraṁgenalu doreyārbhbhūpati vīrapāṁḍya ninagī viśvaṁbharācakradoḷu . śaraṇāyātajanakke vārinidhi
yāytudvṛttaraṁ kūḍe saṁharisalu kattarivāṇiyāyturuyaśōvallīvitānakke dalu parinīrāytosedāgaḷuṁ vijayalakṣmī
dēvigāḍalu sarōvaramāytoḷugali vīrapāṁḍyabhujadaṁḍōgrāsidhārājaḷaṁ . narapati pāṁḍya nīṁ taguḷe matpriyaraṁ
neṟe kādudī triṇaṁ varanunivrittiliṁgavuragāleyavapucayaveṁdu pūjiparnneradu kaṟuṁkeyeṁdu jinaneṁdu gajājinadhā
riyeṁdu nāgaraposateṁdu jakkiyarēvenuttavanuddhatavairikāṁteyaru . va . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḷēśvara kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdiga(ṁ)ṇḍaṁ rājigacō
ḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmatu vīrapāṁḍyadēvaru kaḍaṁbaḷige sāyiramumaṁ ballakuṁda mūnūṟumaṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralā kōgaḷināḍoḷage . v® . jaḷanidhiyaṁ paḷaṁcelevanēkataṭāka dinabjaṣaṇḍadiṁ beḷadeṟagirdda keyvoladinunnatacaṁpakacōca
mōcapāṭaḷapanasāṁbrapūgavananāgalatāḷiyinagrahāramaṁgaḷamaṇidarppaṇaṁ negaḷda bāguḷiyoppuvadī dharitriyoḷ . tīḍuva teṁbalarba
ḷasi tadvanalakṣmiya muṁde maṁgaḷaṁ bāḍuva tuṁbi kōḍuva puḷilu naḍedāḍuva haṁse rāgadiṁdāḍuva sōge bādinoḷavōdinoḷaṁ vibudharkkaḷaṁ todaḷmāḍuva
rājakīratati bāguḷiyoppuva naṁdanaṁgaḷoḷ . Inaśaśiraśmiyaṁ nusuḷalīyada nāgalatāvitāna naṁdanatamamaṁ ghanāgamamideṁdiruḷeṁdu ka
nalva haṁse narttanamanoḍarccutirppa navilōvōtoḍagūḍada jakkavakki sanmanasijarāgadiṁ nereva daṁpati divyavanāṁtarāḷadoḷ . cārutarapravāḷaruci miṁcu
madāḷi ghanāḷi mallikākōrakamālikalutusumarēṇucayaṁ suracāpavāṁbrabhūjōruphaḷaṁgaḷaḷu sōneye sōneyenalu nirutaṁ basaṁtamuṁ
kārumadommeyuṁ negaḷda bāguḷiyoppuva nandanaṁgaḷoḷ . jalajanibhāssye kairavadaḷāyatalōcane haṁsayāne pāṭaḷasamagandhikē
ki kabarībhare pallavahaste kīrakōkiḷakaḷanāde gucchanibiḍastani tānanisirppa tatpurīlalaneyanārppane stutiyisalu suramaṁ
trisakhaṁ caturmmukha . manevane śaṁkarācyutabudhātithipūjeyinagnihōtradiṁdanupamavēdanādamaṭhasatrasabhāśivaviṣṇuvā
gnikētanatatikērigēri janadiṁ sale tiṁtiṇibīdivīdi tānenisuvadāgaḷuṁ negaḷda bāguḷi viśvamahītaḷāgradoḷ . śrīlalanānvi
tarssakaḷavēdavidarbbahuśāstrakōvidarppālitadharmmarārjjitamakharkṛtapuṇyarenaluke satyavākśīlaraniṣṭaśiṣṭajanakalpamahījarane
yde meynavirnnālageyādaḍaṁ pogaḷalārkume vāsugiyayvadiṁbara . bharatavyākaraṇāgamasmṛtipurāṇa
sōmaṣaṭtarkkavistararugraprativādidarppadhanalakṣmīśvararbhbhūnutādhvaradīkṣāyajñamānyareṁdu pogaḷguṁ sarvvōrvvi kūrttayvadiṁ
baranuddāmaviḍaṁbaraṁ viḍaṁbaraṁ vijayakīrttiśrīlatālaṁbara . biruda mastakamaṇḍanarppu
raṁdarasamaśauryyarugraripumaṁneyapannegavainatēyarāntaribaḷa vajrapaṁjara
rnnirupamareṁbudurvvi varavīraviḍaṁbaranayvadiṁbara . hariyentaṁte vinīta ruṣṇakaraneṁtaṁte pratā
pānvitarddhareyeṁtaṁte samastagōtraniratarśakrēbhameṁtaṁte vistara raivadiṁbara lōkadoḷ . Avarūḷu . v® .
vineyāṁbhōnidhiyeṁdu vaninikaraṁ pratyakṣajīmūtavāhananeṁdu bhāradvājagōtrābdhivarddhanarākātuhināṁ
śuveṁdu pogaḷguṁ vidvajjanaṁ viśvabhūvinutana beṇneya māḷapayyananiḷālōkaikavikhyātanaṁ . ka . vinute māḷapayyana
vanite patibrate samastaśubhalakṣaṇe sajjanakāmadhēnuveṁbudī janamellaṁ rāmiyakkanaṁ guṇanidhiyaṁ . śrīramaṇi rāmiya
kkana cārūdaradugdhavārdhiyoḷu kaḷpakujākāradinudayaṁgeydanudāraṁ śrīciddarājanūrjjitatējaṁ . v® . jā
karamanaṁbaramaṁ dinapaṁ payōdhiyaṁ murariputāraśaiḷamanumāpati rātriyaniṁdaḷaṁkarisuva māḷkeyiṁde nija manūrjji
tamāge māḍidaṁ varavibhavānvitaṁ budhaśikhāmaṇi sudguṇavārddhi ciddaṇaṁ . satiratnaṁ ciddarājāṁgane patihitadiṁ sīte sau
bhāgyadiṁ pārvvati nityaiśvaryyadiṁ śrīvadhu matiyodaviṁ bhārati kānteyendu dhṛtiyiṁdaṁ dhātri nayavinayasadācāracāritraśōbhānviteyaṁ sa
ddharmeyaṁ dharmmaveyanakhiḷabhūmaṁḍaḷaṁ rāgadiṁdaṁ . Ā dharmmaveya vaṁśāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe . kanakagirīndranaṁte vibudhāśrayaniṁdrana daṁtiyaṁtesadanu
pamadāni cakradharanaṁte vinītanenalsamastasajjanatati kāśyapānvayaśirōmaṇiyaṁ dvijavaṁśadīpanaṁ vinayadinēṁdudharmmeyaṣaḍaṁgiyanu
dghaguṇaprasaṁgiya . kaṁ . Ā vibhuvina sati mādave bhūviśrutaviśadakīrttiyantavara magaṁ kōvidananantavāgvidyāvidananavadyavibhavasadmaṁ padmaṁ .
vinayanidhi padmanābhana vanite mahīvinute bhuvanajīvanatanupāvane puṇyamūrtti nirmmaḷeyanaghe pratyakṣagaṁge gaṁgādēvi
niravadyavaśiṣṭhānvayamuraripupathajāte �vonalōcane phēnāṁbare haṁsayāne guṇamaṇi saridadhipatipadmapatni gaṁgādēvi .
girirājamēnakībhāsurajaṭharadoḷadrijāte puṭṭidavolu padmarasaṁgaṁ gaṁgavegaṁ dharaṇīsute dharmmavaniteyudayaṁgeydaḷ .
dhareyoḷage puruṣaratnaṁ varadaṁ śrīdharanudāttaramaṇīratnaṁ nirutaṁ dharmmaveyeṁdī harimāḍidanalte ratnamēḷāpakamaṁ .
Anavadyakāśyapānvayavinutakṣīrābdhisaṁbhavēṁdire dharmmāṁgane tāṁ śrīdharavakṣadoḷanunayadiṁ satatavirppudoṁdaccariyē .
manumārggacaritre tavarmmaneyoḷu dharmmāṁganābhidhānadinātmēśanenippa ciddarājana manayoḷu nāgāṁbikābhidhānadinesevaḷu . v® .
sulalitadibyakaḷpalateyiṁ vanavāḍuva rājahaṁseyiṁ koḷanamṛtāṁśulēkheyiniruḷdinapaprabheyiṁ nabhaṁ mahīvaḷayado
ḷoppuvaṁte guṇi dharmmaveyiṁ varakāśyapānvayaṁ taḷedudu permmeyaṁ pesaranuṁnatiyaṁ yaśamaṁ prabhutvamaṁ . hariyuviṁdire
yuṁ sarōjatanūjanuṁ varavāṇiyuṁ girīśanuṁ girirājaputriyuviṁdranuṁ śaciyuṁ vaśiṣṭharuvaruṁdhatiyuṁ viḷāsadinippavōlguṇa
vārddhi ciddarasanuṁ vadhu dharmiyakkanuvirkke rāgadinurvviyoḷu . svasti yamaniyamaspādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapahō
masamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnarappa śrīmaddhariścaṁdradattiya mahāgrahāraṁ bāguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhamahāja
namayvadiṁbara saṁnidhānadalu śrīśakavarṣada 1082 neya vikramasaṁvatsarada bhādrapadamāsada puṇnami bṛ
haspativāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu dharmmeyaṣaḍaṁgiyara magaṁ padmaṇnana magaḷu dharmmiyakkaṁ tāṁ māḍisideḍegē
riya baḍagavāgila śrīlakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ Ā dēvaralli śāstrabyākhyā
namaṁ māḍaluṁ purāṇamaṁ hēḷalu vorbbupādhyāyargge varṣavarṣakke bāguḷiyēḷu gadyāṇa poṁna jīvatakkaṁ Ā dēvaragrā
sanada brāhmaṇabhōjanakkaṁ śrīmadayvadiṁbargge pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭavara kayyalu sarbbabādhāparihāramaṁ sarvvanamaśyama sarvvamā
nyamaṁ paḍedu piriyakeṟeya keḷage lālabāgina harinīrilli biṭṭaḍaketōṁṭa kaṁmaṁ nūṟeppattu Ī tōṁṭake baḍagamaṁ kariyōṇi teṁka
maṁ kariyōṇi nīrōṇi ghaisāsarakēśavadēvana nūṟa mūvattu marakke dēvara tōṁṭada bāviyalu nīranettiyūḍuvaru . Ī dharmamaṁ prati
pālisidavargge gaṁgādēviyalli sāyira brāhmaṇargge sāyira kavilegaḷaṁ koṭṭa phalavakkuṁ Ī dharmmakke kēḍaṁ māḍidavargge sāyira brāhma
ṇarumaṁ sāyira kavileyumaṁ konda mahāpātakadōṣamakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . mattavā tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa tōṁṭa kammaṁ 40 kaṭṭaḷikeṟeya baḍa
kiyakaṭṭeya keḷage biṭṭa bhūmi kamma 700 .
Digital edition of SII 9.267 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
